name: fu-claude-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code tooling: error-tracking sweep, PR review, orders-API inspection, pg/mssql-stage DB access, k8dash cluster inspection, and ce-compound.

plugins.name: fu-et-sweep
plugins.description: Sweep a service's Datadog Error Tracking into de-duped GitHub issues with drafted root-cause writeups.

plugins.name: fu-log-sweep
plugins.description: Sweep a service's Datadog error-level Logs into de-duped GitHub issues with drafted root-cause writeups, deduping on a computed error signature.

plugins.name: fu-inspecting-orders-api
plugins.description: Inspect an Orders API (orders, payloads, hierarchy) from config-resolved host + token.

plugins.name: fu-pg-stage
plugins.description: Connect to a Postgres DB whose credentials come from HashiCorp Vault's database secrets engine.

plugins.name: fu-mssql-stage
plugins.description: Connect to a SQL Server DB with Windows (integrated) authentication — native on Windows, or via the Windows-host sqlcmd.exe under WSL.

plugins.name: fu-k8dash
plugins.description: Read-only Kubernetes inspection across clusters (stage/prod, pick with -c) via the k8dash dashboard's API proxy (GET-only, RBAC-bounded; user's OIDC bearer token).

plugins.name: fu-datadog-pup
plugins.description: Query Datadog from the terminal with the `pup` CLI — search logs/traces, triage Error Tracking, and run auth/meta ops (OAuth login, site/org selection).

plugins.name: fu-ce-compound
plugins.description: Document a recently solved problem to compound your team's knowledge (fork of EveryInc ce-compound).

plugins.name: fu-dev-guards
plugins.description: Dev safety guards: worktree path enforcement, protected-branch commit blocking, and dotnet format pre-commit.

plugins.name: fu-wsl-setup
plugins.description: Provision a WSL work environment for Claude Code from Windows PowerShell 7+ — WSL version check, pick/create a Debian instance, then drive the full tool install sequence (non-interactive work automated, privileged/interactive steps handed to the user).
